summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Membership Enrollment feature. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend enrollment page and admin fields manager working correctly.

issues: Fields appear empty on initial load until validation is triggered - this is expected behavior as fields load from API

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about span inside select/option elements in EnrollmentFieldsManager.js - likely from React DevTools or browser extension, not a code issue
seed_data_creation: 49 enrollment fields seeded on backend startup

backend_apis.POST /api/public/enrollment/validate-cod: PASS - Rejects invalid/empty codes, accepts valid ones
backend_apis.POST /api/public/enrollment/submit: PASS - Validates email, password length, password match

frontend_enrollment_page.Invite code validation via API: PASS - Shows error for invalid codes
